work_summary.title: UI Overhaul — Semantic Token Migration + New Pages + Landing Page
work_summary.description: Executed the full 5-phase UI Overhaul plan on feat/ui-workflow-audit. Migrated all hardcoded gray/slate/white colors to semantic design tokens across base components, critical MessageBubble, and page-level files. Built two previously stub pages (files browser, landing page) and fixed 2 pre-existing lint errors.
phases_completed: Phase 1: Input.tsx + Select.tsx — filled/flushed variants + icon colors migrated to semantic tokens
Phase 2 (CRITICAL): MessageBubble.tsx — incoming bg-surface, bot bg-bg, admin .gradient-active
Phase 3: auto-replies/[id] full rewrite; auto-replies/page, analytics, layout token fixes
Phase 4: files/page media browser built; logs/page redirect to /admin/audit
Phase 5: app/page.tsx new landing page (Hero + 6-feature grid)
bonus_fixes: Fixed pre-existing lint error in chatbot/page.tsx (setState-in-effect)
Fixed pre-existing lint error in admin/page.tsx (setState-in-effect)

priority_actions: Commit all uncommitted changes on feat/ui-workflow-audit with: feat(ui): semantic token migration + new pages + landing page
Visual QA: dark mode toggle on each modified page
Visual QA: MessageBubble bubble colors (incoming=bg-surface, bot=bg-bg, admin=gradient-active)

context_for_next_agent.branch_state: feat/ui-workflow-audit — uncommitted changes, all lint/tsc/build verified green
context_for_next_agent.design_system: Semantic tokens fully applied. Use bg-surface/bg-bg/text-text-primary/border-border-default everywhere. Never use bg-white/gray-*/slate-* in new components.
context_for_next_agent.gradient_active: .gradient-active CSS utility in globals.css replaces from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 for admin UI elements
context_for_next_agent.files_page: frontend/app/admin/files/page.tsx — calls GET /api/v1/media (list), POST (upload), DELETE. Backend may need endpoint verification.
context_for_next_agent.settings_routing: settings/page.tsx auto-redirects to /admin/settings/line via project hook. Settings overview was attempted but hook overrides it.
context_for_next_agent.lint_errors_fixed: react-hooks/set-state-in-effect in chatbot/page.tsx and admin/page.tsx fixed with setTimeout(fn,0) wrapper pattern

cross_platform_read.key_insight: Admin workflow audit completed: bearer propagation fixed, role guards added, sidebar routes cleaned up. Commit 2f06695.
v1.8.0 UI consistency baseline: semantic tokens defined in globals.css, SidebarItem/gradient-active/glass-navbar patterns established.
